name: @pryzm/renderer-three
description: PRYZM 2 — L5 renderer-three workspace surface lifecycle. PR 4.A.4 (Wave 4 Track A) home for `WorkspaceSurface` — the typed mount/dispose handle that retires the legacy `(window as any).platformShell.setProjectContext(...)` cast in `src/main.ts workspaceMount.show()`. Successor concept to the deleted-in-D.4.5 `WorkspaceMountBridge`; carries no bridge semantics — just the typed lifecycle handle the runtime exposes through `runtime.workspace.surface`. Wave 7+8 (P2): sole THREE owner — all monorepo files import from '@pryzm/renderer-three/three' not from 'three' directly.
